
<!-- VISIBLE ONLY ON PAGES THAT HAVE A CUSTOM METADATA TAG:

```includes:
    developer: true
``` -->

:::: {.content-visible unless-format="revealjs" when-meta="includes.blocks"}
- The associated model's inventory fields
- Fields from artifacts logged on the associated model

1. Click **{ } Insert Variable {{< fa angle-down >}}** in the toolbar while editing a content block.

1. Select the variable you want to reference from the drop-down menus:

   - **[model]{.smallcaps}** — Model inventory field values by field group.^[[Edit model inventory fields](/guide/model-inventory/edit-model-inventory-fields.qmd)]
   - **[{artifact type}]{.smallcaps}** — Artifact field values grouped by artifact type, where `{artifact type}` represents the name of your artifact type. Only types of artifacts already logged on the associated model will appear in this selection.^[[Add and manage artifacts](/guide/model-validation/add-manage-artifacts.qmd)]

   ::: {.callout}
   Note that while you are able to select fields with empty values within available model inventory or artifact type fields, no value will be displayed in the content block until the field is populated.

   :::

1. Click away from the content block to apply your changes, and confirm that the correct variable value is displayed in the content block as expected.

::::

<!-- VISIBLE ONLY ON PAGES THAT **DO NOT** HAVE A CUSTOM METADATA TAG:

```includes:
    developer: true
``` -->

:::: {.content-visible unless-format="revealjs" unless-meta="includes.blocks"}
- The associated model's inventory fields
- Fields from artifacts logged on the associated model

1. Click **{ } Insert Variable {{< fa angle-down >}}** in the toolbar while editing a content block.

1. Select the variable you want to reference from the drop-down menus:

   - **Model {{< fa arrow-right >}}** — Model inventory field values.^[[Edit model inventory fields](/guide/model-inventory/edit-model-inventory-fields.qmd)]
   - **{Artifact Type} {{< fa arrow-right >}}** — Artifact field values, where `{artifact type}` represents the name of your artifact type.^[[Add and manage artifacts](/guide/model-validation/add-manage-artifacts.qmd)]

1. Click away from the content block to apply your changes, and confirm that the correct variable value is displayed in the content block as expected.

::::
